Пусть мечты сбываются. ✨" } 2026-05-12T22:07:26.903Z [info] Stopping bot Bot exited with code 0 ``` Button `Get token in app` can be made shorter `Get token`. And can be put to the right on the same line as the access token field. Also access token field should show 10 characters at start and end, so we can confirm it changed on login, also there should be ability to reset token (another button). All UI that depend on token like start button should be active (not disabled) only if token provided. Also resetting token should immediately stop the bot. `Save configuration` button should be removed, instead each change to each field, should be saved automatically on change with 1-2 second debounce. And notification about each saved field/property and so on should be shown, so user always have visual confirmation that action completed or failed. Priority friend IDs should be prefilled immediately on first connection with a token, as all outgoing requests that are not mutual would be lost if user selects `Cancel outgoing friend requests`, so by default they should pre-fill immediately. And also we need to show check or cross emoji near the token to give visual feedback if the connection is successful immediately, and if token is broken or expired we also cannot start the bot. Now mode switcher in the middle, theme switch should be to the right and drop down should contain emojis not only text, the same goes for language it goes to the left of mode switcher. So mode is aligned center, language is aligned to left, and is placed at the most left, theme is to the right (aligned and placed). Start button with execution state (may be with emoji or something creative) should be in the middle, right under the mode. And start button should be made bigger. On big screens features should be in 2 columns, on mobile size screens in 1 column. All messages like this should be gender neutral, for example `Готов принять заявку в друзья.` works only for males. ``` Приму заявки в друзья. Открыт для новых знакомств. Жду заявку. Если хочется пообщаться — добавляйся в друзья. Готов принять заявку в друзья. Можно подружиться. Жду заявку в друзья. Принимаю заявки в друзья — пиши, познакомимся. Заявки в друзья приветствуются. Добавляйся в друзья, рад буду общению. Открыт для новых друзей. Заявки принимаются. Жду заявок в друзья — буду рад познакомиться. ``` Resize of all text areas should work only vertically and if user didn't resize it manually, resize should be automatic per content to fit all lines of text. Also for `Invitation messages` and `Birthday greetings` there should have `reset to default` button and also `clear` button. ``` 🎉 Поздравляю с днём рождения! С днём рождения! 🎂 🎈 Поздравляю с праздником! Желаю всего самого лучшего! 🌟 🥳 С днём рождения! Счастья и здоровья! 💐 🎁 С днём рождения! Пусть всё получится. Радости и улыбок! ☀️ С днём рождения! Пусть мечты сбываются. ✨ Поздравляю! Удачи во всём. 🍀 ``` In here by default we should always include `c днём рождения` or similar. `Радости и улыбок! ☀️` this and `Желаю всего самого лучшего! 🌟` will not work, by themselves. `Invitation post communities` should be prefilled with a list default communities from https://github.com/konard/vk-bot. `Invitation post communities`, `Priority friend IDs` - these should work with space separated, comma separated (`,`, `;` and so on), new line separated, just any links notation with all commas uses as additional separators. And the list may contain not only ids, but also links to friends/communities. Every possibility of input should be perfectly parsable, so there will be no need to explain users anything too much, it should just work with most of cases. And of course all the error should be fixed. We should deeply explore the differences between our app and https://github.com/konard/vk-bot (here all these features were working). We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Fixes and improvements
